name: 綠茶白蓮花（回頭前任×商業女強人面具）
description: 童黛表面溫柔體貼、事業有成，實際上一直監視男主、處心積慮搶位。被女主讀心術一一揭穿，是觀眾最愛恨的反派類型。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Nanja, I didn't mean to come between you and Wine... Is Tong Dai really having me watched?... She saw the Rome family was failing, found some excuse, and ran off abroad. Now that the Rome family is at its peak, she comes running back with all those green hats.
examples.context: 童黛表面溫柔體貼、事業有成，實際上一直監視男主、處心積慮搶位。被女主讀心術一一揭穿，是觀眾最愛恨的反派類型。
